g.text: Channel Shift Measurement and Track Correction
This workflow was created for the research group of Luca Giorgetti
by Jan Eglinger, Friedrich Miescher Institute for Biomedical Research (FMI), Basel
In order to use this workflow, please make sure you installed the following extensions:
- KNIME Nodes for Wide Data (many columns)
to select a directory in the file chooser dialog (when configuring the output folder), navigate to the parent folder,
then select the target folder (but don't double-click) and click Choose.
Choose input folder for bead images
Adjust detection parameters for each channel
Choose output folder for corrected xml
